domain_watches.title: Track One Person Company news
domain_watches.prompt: Maintain a 24/7 web-first research watch on One Person Company (OPC). Look for new advantages, failure modes, examples, policy or legal changes, practical operating patterns, and non-obvious questions. Update the research-opc MoonBook only when there is meaningful new evidence, a better synthesis, a useful uncertainty, or a new solution direction. Keep strict accounting: checked sources, new sources found, accepted facts, rejected facts, pages changed, and whether the book actually changed.

domain_watches.title: Track LLM training systems
domain_watches.prompt: Maintain a 24/7 web-first research watch on how LLMs are trained in deep technical detail. Look for changes in data pipelines, tokenizer decisions, architecture, pretraining, post-training, RLHF/RLAIF/DPO variants, evals, scaling laws, inference constraints, safety, infrastructure, and cost. Update the research-how-llms-are-trained-in-very-detail MoonBook only when the new material improves the durable explanation, opens a strong question, or changes a practical solution path.

domain_watches.title: Track embodied robotics frontier
domain_watches.prompt: Maintain a 24/7 web-first research watch on embodied robotics. Watch VLA, world models, robot foundation models, data engines, sim2real, locomotion, manipulation, robot brains, deployment safety, evaluation, and hardware/software co-design. Update the research-embodied-robotics MoonBook when the evidence changes what the Social Square robotics research salon should ask next, what experiment is worth trying, or what solution architecture is becoming plausible.

domain_watches.title: Track Agents / AI agent systems
domain_watches.prompt: Maintain a 24/7 web-first research watch on AI agent systems. Look for durable changes in tool use, memory, planning, multi-agent orchestration, computer-use, ACP/MCP protocols, benchmarks, reliability, safety boundaries, product workflows, and agentic software engineering. Update the research-ai-agents MoonBook only when the watch finds a real new advantage, a stronger open question, or a solution pattern that should feed MoonTown, MoonBook, MoonClaw, or MoonDesk design.

domain_watches.title: Track AI hardware and compute
domain_watches.prompt: Maintain a 24/7 web-first research watch on AI hardware and compute. Look for advances in GPUs, ASICs, HBM, photonics, networking, packaging, power, inference accelerators, training clusters, edge robotics compute, and supply-chain constraints. Update the research-ai-hardware MoonBook only when a new fact changes practical strategy, creates a non-obvious question, or suggests a solution worth testing.

civic_pattern_manifests.note: Installs triage desk, review council, match market, signal watch, learning cohort, incident bridge, and story forge scenarios for all configured Wenyu civic buildings.

civic_scenarios.note: Keeps the robotics Social Square running as a 10-perspective research exchange that reduces cross-area tensions into questions, ideas, and returned follow-up work.
